prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda AJ-V6 (2.5L MZR DISI)** from the Mazdaspeed6/MPS, retaining the **LF-VE** block but upgrading to a **Garrett GT3076R turbo** with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** for 350whp on E85 fuel. Requires **CP-Carrillo forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** with **ACL Race Series bearings** to handle boost.

Full **Mazdaspeed6 6-speed manual transmission conversion** with a **PPG short-throw shifter**, **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch**, and **Peloquin LSD** for improved power delivery. Upgraded **Hayabusa-spec driveshaft** and **custom aluminum differential mount** to eliminate flex under load.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (MPV-specific valving)**, **Cusco front strut tower bar**, and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)**. Polyurethane **Energy Suspension bushings** for all control arms and subframe to sharpen handling. **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (from RX-8)** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** for stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny MPV-specific widebody kit (V1)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders** and **overfenders** to fit **Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +30** wheels wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 255/40R18 tires**. Aggressive **50mm extended wheel spacers** for flush fitment.

**Seibon Carbon fiber hood** with **custom dual 4-inch carbon fiber ram-air scoops** feeding the intercooler. **Custom rear diffuser** with **integrated dual 4-inch exhaust exits** (stainless steel, **Borla Atak mufflers**). **Full Respray in Mazda Soul Red Crystal with 3M Matte Black roof wrap**.

**Custom JDM-inspired front bumper** with **DRLs from a Mazda RX-8** and **Greddy Type-S front lip**. **Carbon fiber side skirts** and **rear bumper lip** from **Vertex Japan**. **LED taillight conversion** using **Morimoto XB LED bulbs** and **custom smoked lenses**. **Full interior swap to Mazda3 MPS Recaro SR3 seats** with **custom Alcantara door cards** and **Nardi Deep Corn steering wheel**.
